use_cases: Website footer providing navigation links for site-wide navigation
Social media link collection for user connection and sharing
Legal/utility links container for About, Help, and Support pages
ai_summary: A minimalist footer component from the Meschacirung design system featuring centered navigation links with hover transitions and social media icon placeholders. Uses Tailwind CSS for styling with responsive flexbox layout, ideal for landing pages and web applications needing a clean, functional footer section.
